svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="RjaHQBLLRdrX_T2I0FtQ"> <mxGraphModel dx="907" dy="558" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="Angular Components" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="190" x="100" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;fontSize=10;fillColor=#ffffc0;strokeColor=#999900;size=15;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="a = new Producto(precio)
b = new CopPipe(a)
c = new PorcentajePipe(b)
c.transform()
// Decorator -> Decorator -> Component" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="270" x="310" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=open;endFill=0;dashed=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="«interface»
PipeTransform" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="190" x="100" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="+ transform(value: number): string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="190" x="100" y="265" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Precio / Total
(number)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="160" x="30" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="..." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="160" x="30" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ transform(): string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="160" x="30" y="453" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.2;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="CopPipe" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="210" x="230" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="- wrappee: PipeTransform" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="210" x="230" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ CopPipe(c: PipeTransform)
+ transform(): string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="210" x="230" y="455" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" edge="1" parent="1" source="9" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.8;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#ffffc0;strokeColor=#999900;size=15;" value="wrappee = c" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="140" x="525" y="451" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="36" edge="1" parent="1" source="30" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=none;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="11"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#ffffc0;strokeColor=#999900;size=15;" value="wrappee.transform()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="170" x="520" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="37" edge="1" parent="1" source="31" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=none;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.75;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="11"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="Concrete Decorators" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="210" x="230" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="..." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="210" x="230" y="625" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ transform(): string
+ porcentaje(total, grand): number" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="210" x="230" y="653" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="24" edge="1" parent="1" source="12" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=0;endArrow=block;endFill=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="11"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#ffffc0;strokeColor=#999900;size=15;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="super::transform()
porcentaje()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="160" x="515" y="654.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="38" edge="1" parent="1" source="32" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=none;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="14"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="z7Sba67oH-qDccvyN9bo-38" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;dashPattern=1 3;strokeWidth=2;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="3" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="400" y="430" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="450" y="380" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="z7Sba67oH-qDccvyN9bo-39" edge="1" parent="1" source="4" style="endArrow=diamondThin;endFill=0;endSize=24;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="10" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" width="160" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="480" y="238" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="330" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="400" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="440" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="490" y="310" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="470" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 45px; margin-left: 71px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 192), rgb(26, 26, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(153, 153, 0), rgb(125, 125, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 260px; height: 1px; padding-top: 45px; margin-left: 290px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
a = new Producto(precio)
b = new CopPipe(a)
c = new PorcentajePipe(b)
c.transform()
// Decorator -> Decorator -> Component
